title: Build a Minecraft Elevator
prompt: You want to build an elevator in Minecraft that goes up 5 floors. Each floor is 4 blocks tall. How many blocks tall is the whole elevator?
subject: MATHEMATICS

title: LEGO Rows
prompt: You have 3 rows of LEGO bricks. Each row has 6 bricks. How many bricks do you have in total?
subject: MATHEMATICS

title: Double the Cookie Recipe
prompt: A cookie recipe needs 4 eggs. You want to make double the recipe. How many eggs do you need?
subject: MATHEMATICS

title: Push the Swing
prompt: You push a friend on the swing. What happens when you push harder? What happens when you push softer?
subject: PHYSICS

title: What Comes Next?
prompt: You see a pattern: red, blue, red, blue, red, blue. What color comes next?
subject: MATHEMATICS
